steps.title: Identify the antecedent
steps.content: The blank is the subject of finally made a decision. The sentence later identifies the decision-makers as the judges for the 1947 Nobel Prize in Literature, so the pronoun must refer to a plural group.

steps.title: Reject singular or vague pronouns
steps.content: Choice A is indefinite and singular. Choice B addresses the reader rather than the judges. Choice D is singular and cannot refer to the plural judges. The answer is C.
